zh.lifeSummary: 當Alexander Innes 9th of Innes - of that Ilk於1360年出生在蘇格蘭艾爾金爾時，他的父親Sir Robert Innes 8th of Innes - of that Ilk25歲，母親Lady Christian de Barclay16歲。他於1380年之前與Lady Janet de Aberchirder結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1412年4月28日享年52歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alexander Innes 9th of Innes - of that Ilk于1360年出生在苏格兰艾爾金爾时，他的父亲Sir Robert Innes 8th of Innes - of that Ilk25岁，母亲Lady Christian de Barclay16岁。他于1380年之前与Lady Janet de Aberchirder结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1412年4月28日享年52岁。

nameMeanings.name: Innes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: shortened form of McInnis , from Gaelic Mag Aonghuis ‘son of Aonghus’.
Scottish: habitational name from the barony of Innes in Urquhart (Morayshire), named from Gaelic inis ‘island’.

variants.name: Ince
meanings: habitational name from Ince in Makerfield (Lancashire), Ince (Cheshire), or Ince Blundell (Lancashire). The placenames derive from Proto-Welsh ïnïs ‘island’.

possibly a post-medieval West Midlands variant of Hints, a habitational name from either of two places called Hints (Staffordshire, Shropshire). The placenames probably derive from Proto-Welsh hïnt ‘way, path’ + Middle English plural -es.

possibly a variant with plural or post-medieval excrescent -s of Inn, from residence at an inn or inns, from Middle English in (singular) or innes (plural) ‘tavern, lodging(s), tenement(s)’. There seems also to have been some confusion with Scottish Innes .

variants.name: Inch
meanings: English: perhaps, at least in some cases, a variant of   Ince  .

variants.name: McInnis
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Aonghuis, a patronymic from the personal name Aonghus (see Angus ). See also McInnes , compare Irish McGinnis .

variants.name: Inness
meanings: Scottish (Durham and Northumberland): variant of   Innes  .

nameMeanings.name: Alexander
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

en.lifeSummary: When Alexander Innes 9th of Innes - of that Ilk was born in 1360, in Elginshire, Scotland, his father, Sir Robert Innes 8th of Innes - of that Ilk, was 25 and his mother, Lady Christian de Barclay, was 16. He married Lady Janet de Aberchirder before 1380. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. He died on 28 April 1412, at the age of 52.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alexander Innes 9th of Innes - of that Ilk est né en 1360, à Elginshire, Écosse, son père, Sir Robert Innes 8th of Innes - of that Ilk, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Lady Christian de Barclay, avait 16 ans. Il a épousé Lady Janet de Aberchirder avant 1380. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 28 avril 1412, à l’âge de 52 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alexander Innes 9th of Innes - of that Ilk 1360 in Elginshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Robert Innes 8th of Innes - of that Ilk 25 und seine Mutter Lady Christian de Barclay 16. Er hat vor 1380 Lady Janet de Aberchirder geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 28. April 1412 im Alter von 52 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alexander Innes 9th of Innes - of that Ilk è nato il nel 1360 nel Elginshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Sir Robert Innes 8th of Innes - of that Ilk, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Lady Christian de Barclay, aveva 16 anni. Lui sposato Lady Janet de Aberchirder prima del 1380. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì il 28 aprile 1412, all'età di 52 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Alexander Innes 9th of Innes - of that Ilkが1360年にスコットランドエルジンシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir Robert Innes 8th of Innes - of that Ilkは25歳，母Lady Christian de Barclayは16歳であった。1380年以前にLady Janet de Aberchirderと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1412年4月28日に52歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alexander Innes 9th of Innes - of that Ilk(이)가 1360년 스컷랜드 엘긴실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Robert Innes 8th of Innes - of that Ilk(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Christian de Barclay(은)는 16세였다. 그는 1380년 이전 Lady Janet de Aberchirder(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1412년 4월 28일 52세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alexander Innes 9th of Innes - of that Ilk nasceu em 1360, em Elginshire, Scotland, seu pai, Sir Robert Innes 8th of Innes - of that Ilk, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Lady Christian de Barclay, tinha 16 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Janet de Aberchirder antes 1380. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 28 de abril de 1412, com 52 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alexander Innes 9th of Innes - of that Ilk родился в 1360 г. в местности элгиншир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Sir Robert Innes 8th of Innes - of that Ilk было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Christian de Barclay, 16. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Janet de Aberchirder перед 1380 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Он умер 28 апреля 1412 г. в возрасте 52 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alexander Innes 9th of Innes - of that Ilk nació en 1360, en Elginshire, Scotland, su papá, Sir Robert Innes 8th of Innes - of that Ilk, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Lady Christian de Barclay, tenía 16 años. Se casó con Lady Janet de Aberchirder antes de 1380. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió el 28 de abril de 1412, a la edad de 52 años.
